Home / Projects / McLendon Hardware
Project Type Retail Construction
Location Tacoma, WA
Sector Retail / Hardware

McLendon Hardware

Hardware stores present unique construction challenges that go beyond typical retail builds. The McLendon Hardware project in Tacoma required specialized design and construction to support the demanding operational needs of a modern hardware and home improvement retailer.

McLendon's has been a Pacific Northwest institution since 1922, and building a facility for such an established regional brand demanded attention to their specific operational requirements. We delivered construction that accommodates heavy inventory including building materials and equipment, robust floor systems designed for warehouse-style displays and forklift traffic, efficient layout supporting both retail sales and contractor services, and outdoor storage areas with proper drainage and security.

The building combines the durability of industrial construction with the customer-friendly presentation of retail design. High ceilings, wide aisles, and strategic loading access support hardware store operations while maintaining an inviting shopping environment. Quality finishes and thoughtful details create a space where both DIY homeowners and professional contractors feel welcome.

Project Highlights

  • Specialized retail construction for hardware and home improvement operations
  • Robust structural systems supporting heavy inventory and equipment
  • High-bay retail space with efficient product display capability
  • Strategic loading and receiving areas for bulk materials
  • Indoor/outdoor coordination for seasonal and landscape products
  • Layout optimized for both retail customers and contractor services
  • Quality construction serving a respected Pacific Northwest brand

The McLendon Hardware project exemplifies Northway's understanding that different retail formats demand different construction approaches. We bring the flexibility and expertise to deliver specialized retail facilities that truly serve their operational purpose while providing excellent customer experiences.

Building Specialized Retail Space?

We understand the unique requirements of hardware stores, home improvement centers, and specialty retail.
